# FAS Storefront (`fas-cms-fresh`)

> Customer-facing Astro storefront for FAS Motorsports. This repo renders product and content experiences, while commerce authority remains Medusa.

Last updated: 2026-03-11
Canonical docs version: v2026.03.07

## Mission

- Provide storefront UI for discovery, PDP, cart, and checkout UX.
- Consume authoritative commerce state from Medusa-backed flows.
- Use Sanity for optional content enrichment only.

## Non-Negotiable Authority Rules

- `fas-medusa` is the source of truth for products, variants, pricing, inventory, cart, shipping, checkout, and orders.
- Storefront must not authoritatively compute totals, tax, shipping, or order state.
- Stripe is payment processing only (not catalog/order authority).
- Sanity is content only and must not block commerce-critical rendering.

## Canonical References

- `README.md`
- `docs/codex.md`
- `docs/architecture/canonical-commerce-architecture.md`
- `docs/architecture/migration-status.md`
- `docs/governance/checkout-architecture-governance.md`
- `docs/governance/commerce-authority-checklist.md`

## Runtime Flow (Canonical)

`PDP -> canonical cart -> Medusa cart -> PaymentIntent -> Stripe webhook -> Medusa order`

## Key Commands

- `yarn dev`
- `yarn build`
- `yarn preview`
- `yarn lint`
- `yarn type-check`
- `yarn test`
- `yarn env:check:local`
- `yarn env:check:netlify`
- `yarn docs:check`

## High-Value Code Areas

- `src/pages/` - Astro routes and storefront surfaces.
- `src/pages/api/` - BFF/API endpoints (checkout, auth, vendor, promotions, search).
- `src/components/` - reusable UI and React/Astro islands.
- `src/lib/` - data clients, domain helpers, and integrations.
- `src/server/` - server-side auth/http/vendor portal helpers.
- `src/styles/` - theme and global styling.

## Integrations

- Medusa (commerce authority)
- Stripe (payments)
- Sanity (content)
- Shippo (shipping-related flows)
- Resend (email)
- Netlify (deploy/runtime)
